---
title: "25_26 cleaning"
author: "Caroline Nguyen"
date: "2026-04-17"
output: pdf_document
---

# _Initial set-up_

## _Loading in packages and setting working directory_

```{r, setup, include = FALSE}

knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir='C:/Users/cangu/Documents/recess minutes 2025/SB291-Recess-Data')

library(tidyverse)

```

## _Loading 25-26 data_

```{r}

data <- read_csv("raw data/25_26 data.csv")

```

## _Cleaning_

```{r}

length(unique(data$`cds code`))

```
